title: centaurea debeauxii var. nemoralis
intro: Centaurea debeauxii var. nemoralis, also known as the mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species within the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions. Its herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, are believed to have health benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. However, further research is necessary to confirm the efficacy and safety of using mountain centaury for medicinal purposes.
